    Please select a size to see store availability

    for a reason—several, actually. We make this pair in 100 percent cotton that's designed to hold up to daily wear and will only look better the more you wear it. The new classic chino is directly inspired by the original 1940s military-issued pairs that crossed over into civilian life—especially on college campuses where they evolved into a quintessential element of Ivy style. Relaxed through the hip and thigh with a full leg, these chinos are a wardrobe staple for every occasion.

    • 100% cotton.
    • Zip fly.
    • Angled hand pockets for easy entry, back flap pockets.
    • Machine wash.
    • Imported.
    • Select stores.
    • Item BE611.

    • Classic fit.
    • Sits at hip.
    • Easy through the hip and thigh, with a slightly longer rise and a full leg.
    • Front rise: 11 3/8"; 31 1/2" inseam; 17" leg opening (based on size 32/32).

    U.S. Return Policy and Exchange PolicyJ.Crew gladly accepts returns of unworn, unwashed, undamaged or defective merchandise purchased online, by phone or in stores for delivery that shipped to a U.S. address for a full refund or free exchange within 30 days of original purchase.

    Quality story

    Chino edition

    Fabric

    From our customer-favorite stretch chino to broken-in 100 percent cotton twill, our fabrics are built to last and will look even better with wear.  


    Color

    With new shades every season, no matter which color(s) you choose, they’ll break in and evolve according to how you wear and care for them.

    Heritage

    Ever since chinos crossed over from military uniforms into civilian life in the 1940s and ’50s, they’ve been a foundational wardrobe item. Inspired by the utilitarian originals, we’ve spent years refining our chinos to be a cut above—and worth keeping for the next generation.

    Details

    Our chino building blocks have been the same since 1983. You’ll find (nearly) invisible details that signify quality, like a twill-lined waistband, double-welt back pockets and bar tacking at stress points for years of wear.

    How To Wear It

    Rating

    Filter reviews 1 - 6 of 590 Reviews

    What customers are saying:

    Customers love these classic chinos for their high-quality, sturdy cotton fabric and timeless style that works equally well for dressier occasions or casual wear. Many appreciate that the classic cut is comfortable and roomy without feeling overwhelming, making them a versatile choice for everyday use across seasons. The fabric is frequently praised for its durability and ability to break in while retaining a polished look, adding to their appeal as a wardrobe staple. Overall, customers recommend these chinos for their excellent quality, practical design, and dependable fit.

    • Gene Bulge

      Review submitted for promo eligibility.

      Age: 45 to 54Body type: Straight and slenderHeight: 5'9"Size Purchased: 28x32

      Fits true to size

      Classic chinos that work

      2 days ago

      These navy J.Crew classic chinos are an easy staple. The color is clean and versatile, so they pair well with almost anything, from a button-down to a simple tee. The fit feels timeless rather than trendy, which makes them a solid choice for both casual wear and slightly more dressed-up situations. The fabric has a neat, polished look while still being comfortable enough for everyday use. Overall, they do exactly what a classic chino should do: look sharp, wear easily, and stay useful in the rotation.

      Helpful?

      The name says it all - Classic!

      Review submitted for promo eligibility.

      Age: 55 to 64Body type: AthleticHeight: 5'11"Size Purchased: 33-30

      Fits true to size

      Chinos like back in the day...

      6 days ago

      Maybe it's just me, but IMO, skinny leg pants look idiotic. These are traditionally cut chinos, so if your used to wearing khaki chinos the way they were cut in the '80s and '90s (plenty of room in lower leg, wide opening at ankle), these will hit the mark

      Helpful?
